-webkit-transform-origin.syntax: [ left | center | right | top | bottom | <length-percentage> ] | [ left | center | right | <length-percentage> ] [ top | center | bottom | <length-percentage> ] <length>? | [ [ center | left | right ] && [ center | top | bottom ] ] <length>?

all.syntax: initial | inherit | unset | revert | revert-layer | revert-rule

border-limit.syntax: all | [ sides | corners ] <length-percentage [0,∞]>? | [ top | right | bottom | left ] <length-percentage [0,∞]>

box-snap.syntax: none | block-start | block-end | center | baseline | last-baseline

break-after.syntax: auto | avoid | always | all | avoid-page | page | left | right | recto | verso | avoid-column | column | avoid-region | region

break-before.syntax: auto | avoid | always | all | avoid-page | page | left | right | recto | verso | avoid-column | column | avoid-region | region

clear.syntax: inline-start | inline-end | block-start | block-end | left | right | top | bottom | both-inline | both-block | both | none

contain.syntax: none | strict | content | [ [size | inline-size] || layout || style || paint ]

continue.syntax: auto | discard | collapse | -webkit-legacy | overflow | paginate | fragments

fill-origin.syntax: match-parent | fill-box | stroke-box | content-box | padding-box | border-box

float.syntax: block-start | block-end | inline-start | inline-end | snap-block | <snap-block()> | snap-inline | <snap-inline()> | left | right | top | bottom | none | footnote

font-size-adjust.syntax: none | [ ex-height | cap-height | ch-width | ic-width | ic-height ]? [ from-font | <number [0,∞]> ]

font-stretch.syntax: normal | <percentage [0,∞]> | ultra-condensed | extra-condensed | condensed | semi-condensed | semi-expanded | expanded | extra-expanded | ultra-expanded

font-variant.syntax: normal | none | [ [ <common-lig-values> || <discretionary-lig-values> || <historical-lig-values> || <contextual-alt-values> ] || [ small-caps | all-small-caps | petite-caps | all-petite-caps | unicase | titling-caps ] || [ stylistic(<font-feature-value-name>) || historical-forms || styleset(<font-feature-value-name>#) || character-variant(<font-feature-value-name>#) || swash(<font-feature-value-name>) || ornaments(<font-feature-value-name>) || annotation(<font-feature-value-name>) ] || [ <numeric-figure-values> || <numeric-spacing-values> || <numeric-fraction-values> || ordinal || slashed-zero ] || [ <east-asian-variant-values> || <east-asian-width-values> || ruby ] || [ sub | super ] || [ text | emoji | unicode ] ]

font-variant-alternates.syntax: normal | [ stylistic(<font-feature-value-name>) || historical-forms || styleset(<font-feature-value-name>#) || character-variant(<font-feature-value-name>#) || swash(<font-feature-value-name>) || ornaments(<font-feature-value-name>) || annotation(<font-feature-value-name>) ]

font-variant-caps.syntax: normal | small-caps | all-small-caps | petite-caps | all-petite-caps | unicase | titling-caps

font-width.syntax: normal | <percentage [0,∞]> | ultra-condensed | extra-condensed | condensed | semi-condensed | semi-expanded | expanded | extra-expanded | ultra-expanded

height.syntax: auto | <length-percentage [0,∞]> | min-content | max-content | fit-content(<length-percentage [0,∞]>) | <calc-size()> | <anchor-size()> | stretch | fit-content | contain

justify-items.syntax: normal | stretch | <baseline-position> | <overflow-position>? [ <self-position> | left | right ] | legacy | legacy && [ left | right | center ]

justify-self.syntax: auto | <overflow-position>? [ normal | <self-position> | left | right ] | stretch | <baseline-position> | anchor-center

margin-trim.syntax: none | [ block || inline ] | [ block-start || inline-start || block-end || inline-end ]

max-height.syntax: none | <length-percentage [0,∞]> | min-content | max-content | fit-content(<length-percentage [0,∞]>) | <calc-size()> | <anchor-size()> | stretch | fit-content | contain

max-width.syntax: none | <length-percentage [0,∞]> | min-content | max-content | fit-content(<length-percentage [0,∞]>) | <calc-size()> | <anchor-size()> | stretch | fit-content | contain

min-height.syntax: auto | <length-percentage [0,∞]> | min-content | max-content | fit-content(<length-percentage [0,∞]>) | <calc-size()> | <anchor-size()> | stretch | fit-content | contain

min-width.syntax: auto | <length-percentage [0,∞]> | min-content | max-content | fit-content(<length-percentage [0,∞]>) | <calc-size()> | <anchor-size()> | stretch | fit-content | contain

page-break-after.syntax: auto | always | avoid | left | right | inherit

page-break-before.syntax: auto | always | avoid | left | right | inherit

pause-after.syntax: <time [0s,∞]> | none | x-weak | weak | medium | strong | x-strong

pause-before.syntax: <time [0s,∞]> | none | x-weak | weak | medium | strong | x-strong

pointer-events.syntax: auto | bounding-box | visiblePainted | visibleFill | visibleStroke | visible | painted | fill | stroke | all | none

reading-flow.syntax: normal | source-order | flex-visual | flex-flow | grid-rows | grid-columns | grid-order

resize.syntax: none | both | horizontal | vertical | block | inline

rest-after.syntax: <time [0s,∞]> | none | x-weak | weak | medium | strong | x-strong

rest-before.syntax: <time [0s,∞]> | none | x-weak | weak | medium | strong | x-strong

scroll-snap-type.syntax: none | [ x | y | block | inline | both ] [ mandatory | proximity ]?

stroke-linejoin.syntax: [ crop | arcs | miter ] || [ bevel | round | fallback ]

stroke-origin.syntax: match-parent | fill-box | stroke-box | content-box | padding-box | border-box

text-align.syntax: start | end | left | right | center | <string> | justify | match-parent | justify-all

text-align-all.syntax: start | end | left | right | center | <string> | justify | match-parent

text-align-last.syntax: auto | start | end | left | right | center | justify | match-parent

text-decoration-line.syntax: none | [ underline || overline || line-through || blink ] | spelling-error | grammar-error

text-decoration-skip-self.syntax: auto | skip-all | [ skip-underline || skip-overline || skip-line-through ] | no-skip

text-emphasis-style.syntax: none | [ [ filled | open ] || [ dot | circle | double-circle | triangle | sesame ] ] | <string>

text-group-align.syntax: none | start | end | left | right | center

text-justify.syntax: [ auto | none | inter-word | inter-character | ruby ] || no-compress

text-transform.syntax: none | [capitalize | uppercase | lowercase ] || full-width || full-size-kana | math-auto

touch-action.syntax: auto | none | [ [ pan-x | pan-left | pan-right ] || [ pan-y | pan-up | pan-down ] || pinch-zoom ] | manipulation

transform-origin.syntax: [ left | center | right | top | bottom | <length-percentage> ] | [ left | center | right | <length-percentage> ] [ top | center | bottom | <length-percentage> ] <length>? | [ [ center | left | right ] && [ center | top | bottom ] ] <length>?

unicode-bidi.syntax: normal | embed | isolate | bidi-override | isolate-override | plaintext

voice-pitch.syntax: <frequency [0Hz,∞]> && absolute | [ [ x-low | low | medium | high | x-high ] || [ <frequency [0Hz,∞]> | <semitones> | <percentage> ] ]

voice-range.syntax: <frequency [0Hz,∞]> && absolute | [ [ x-low | low | medium | high | x-high ] || [ <frequency [0Hz,∞]> | <semitones> | <percentage> ] ]

voice-rate.syntax: [ normal | x-slow | slow | medium | fast | x-fast ] || <percentage [0,∞]>

voice-volume.syntax: silent | [ [ x-soft | soft | medium | loud | x-loud ] || <decibel> ]

white-space-collapse.syntax: collapse | discard | preserve | preserve-breaks | preserve-spaces | break-spaces

width.syntax: auto | <length-percentage [0,∞]> | min-content | max-content | fit-content(<length-percentage [0,∞]>) | <calc-size()> | <anchor-size()> | stretch | fit-content | contain

word-break.syntax: normal | break-all | keep-all | manual | auto-phrase | break-word

wrap-after.syntax: auto | avoid | avoid-line | avoid-flex | line | flex

wrap-before.syntax: auto | avoid | avoid-line | avoid-flex | line | flex

wrap-flow.syntax: auto | both | start | end | minimum | maximum | clear
